query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A SANSUI digital clock radio shows three vertically stacked instances of bright time displays reading 10:28, 10:29, and 10:29 across a dark front panel, with the brand name repeated across the upper edge and three circular elements aligned below the displays.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded, monochrome multiple exposure captures a SANSUI digital clock radio with three ghosted, stacked time readings showing 10:28, 10:29, and 10:29, rendered with dense analog grain, VHS-style noise, and a muted desaturated palette; the repeated brand logo and circular lower elements appear translucent and overlapped, creating a lo-fi archival aesthetic that suggests damaged media and temporal dislocation.
